files.data:
# Course illustrations

Six original illustrations covering Poe’s career, magazine culture, poetic sound, unreliable narration, Gothic atmosphere, and Dupin’s method.

All lesson images and the course cover are stored locally under `assets/images/` for offline compilation and reading. The lesson illustrations were created specifically for this sample repository and do not depend on remote image hosts.

Research and further-reading links remain in the lesson text.

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1600" height="900" viewBox="0 0 1600 900">
  <rect width="1600" height="900" fill="#756d68"/>
  <path d="M0 680 C300 520 560 800 900 620 S1320 440 1600 600 V900 H0Z" fill="#f6f4ef" opacity=".16"/>
  <circle cx="1280" cy="200" r="138" fill="#f6f4ef" opacity=".24"/>
  <text x="110" y="325" fill="#f6f4ef" font-family="Georgia,serif" font-size="78">Edgar Allan Poe</text>
  <text x="110" y="420" fill="#f6f4ef" font-family="Georgia,serif" font-size="72">Sound, Shadow, and Story</text>
  <text x="115" y="505" fill="#f6f4ef" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="30" opacity=".84">An MCF 1.0 course</text>
</svg>

id: craft-and-form
title: "Craft and Form"
description: "A focused unit in Edgar Allan Poe: Sound, Shadow, and Story."
lessons:

  - lessons/02-unreliable-voices.mcf

id: gothic-and-detective
title: "Gothic and Detective Fiction"
description: "A focused unit in Edgar Allan Poe: Sound, Shadow, and Story."
lessons:
  - lessons/01-gothic-pressure.mcf
  - lessons/02-dupin-s-method.mcf

id: life-and-context
title: "Life and Context"
description: "A focused unit in Edgar Allan Poe: Sound, Shadow, and Story."
lessons:
  - lessons/01-a-restless-life.mcf
  - lessons/02-magazines-and-audiences.mcf

mcf: "1.0"
id: edgar-allan-poe
title: "Edgar Allan Poe: Sound, Shadow, and Story"
language: en
description: "A short course on Poe’s life, poetic techniques, and lasting influence on the Gothic and detective traditions."
authors:
  - "Theoria Learning Studio"
license: CC-BY-4.0
version: "1.0.0"
cover: assets/images/cover.svg
chapters:
  - source: chapters/life-and-context
  - source: chapters/craft-and-form
  - source: chapters/gothic-and-detective
